warnings.message:
URDF compile warning (collision, non-blocking materialization): isolated parts detected (not contacting any other part in the checked pose).
- part='left_support' nearest_part='rack_deck' approx_gap=0.0035m pose_index=0 pose=(left_support_fold=0, right_support_fold=0) backend=fcl
- part='rack_deck' nearest_part='left_support' approx_gap=0.0035m pose_index=0 pose=(left_support_fold=0, right_support_fold=0) backend=fcl
- part='right_support' nearest_part='rack_deck' approx_gap=0.0035m pose_index=0 pose=(left_support_fold=0, right_support_fold=0) backend=fcl
Conservative collision envelopes still do not touch, so this is usually a real floating-part or bad-mount bug.
Adjust geometry origins or articulation placement so each isolated part is attached.
